claims.evidence_text: GDD = (Tmax + Tmin)/2 - Tbase  T base is 40F or 4.4C for Winter Wheat
claims.claim_summary: Base temperature for winter wheat GDD calculation is 40F (4.4C).

claims.evidence_text: Regional Wheat Stage / GDD Feekes Stage 3 Min 56 Max 96 Average 73
claims.claim_summary: Winter wheat Feekes growth stage 3 occurs at 56-96 GDD (mean 73), base 40F.

claims.evidence_text: Regional Wheat Stage / GDD Feekes Stage 4 Min 67 Max 102 Average 81
claims.claim_summary: Winter wheat Feekes growth stage 4 occurs at 67-102 GDD (mean 81), base 40F.

claims.evidence_text: Regional Wheat Stage / GDD Feekes Stage 5 Min 74 Max 110 Average 90
claims.claim_summary: Winter wheat Feekes growth stage 5 occurs at 74-110 GDD (mean 90), base 40F.

claims.evidence_text: Regional Wheat Stage / GDD Feekes Stage 6 Min 92 Max 125 Average 105
claims.claim_summary: Winter wheat Feekes growth stage 6 occurs at 92-125 GDD (mean 105), base 40F.

claims.evidence_text: Regional Wheat Stage / GDD Feekes Stage 7 Min 87 Max 126 Average 106
claims.claim_summary: Winter wheat Feekes growth stage 7 occurs at 87-126 GDD (mean 106), base 40F.

claims.evidence_text: World Nitrogen Use Efficiency for Cereal Production is 33%, Agronomy Journal 91:357
claims.claim_summary: World nitrogen use efficiency for cereal (wheat) production is 33%.
